closeout.closed_reason: independent replay deltas stayed at zero for exact, spaced, and arrow surfaces

check_rows.detail: selector follows only the exact-surface repair route closeout
near-exact bridge rows must be the closed route
selector should only run after the objective-or-decoding recommendation
closeout should provide objective, decoding, and fresh-seed candidates
closed route should have no improved replay surfaces

route_rows.selection_reason: changes the learning objective instead of adding more near-exact surface rows
route_rows.risk_control: keep heldout exact pair prompts out of training rows
route_rows.source_why: the current corpus teaches surface patterns but not a stable required exact response
route_rows.source_risk: may still overfit tiny prompt forms

route_rows.selection_reason: can diagnose first-token or separator sensitivity before another training run
route_rows.risk_control: report as diagnostic only; do not treat constrained hits as promotion
route_rows.source_why: arrow surface can produce both terms, so decoding may expose whether exact prompt is first-token or separator sensitive
route_rows.source_risk: decode constraints can mask model weakness

route_rows.selection_reason: checks whether partial pair-readiness is seed-specific
route_rows.risk_control: run after a selected objective/decoding route has a concrete hypothesis
route_rows.source_why: confirm whether the partial pattern is seed-specific before investing in another corpus patch

non_goals: do not add more near-exact surface rows
do not promote constrained decoding as model-quality proof
do not start fresh-seed training without a sharper route hypothesis

interpretation.reason: Near-exact surface rows are closed; the next route should change the objective before more training data is added.
